titleStmt.title: SII 41.249: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 249. (A.R. No. 467 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Sale of 6 vēli of land, freed from taxes, by the sabhā of Perumūr alias Rājanārāyaṇachaturvedimangalam in Perumūr-nāḍu to Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyān Pavaḻakkuṉṟan Vaṉṉāḍuḍaiyān of Chōḻamaṇḍalam, who got it for the temple of Tiruvālaṅgāḍu for feeding pilgrims (apūrvi-āṇḍār).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu poṉmālai nikaḻtara pāmālai malinta parumaṇittira
ḷpuyattiruṉilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷḷiruppat tanavarai mārpavaṉ tanateṉap pe
ṟṟu tirumakaḷoṭu taniyiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarak kaṟpiṉaḷāki Iruppoṭuṉāvakat
tiruppator putumatipol veṇkuṭai mimicai ṉiṟpak karuṅkali yoḷittuvanpilatti
ṭaikkiṭappak kulattiṭait teliṅkavimaṉai viyanamaḷicayeṟavuṅ kaliṅka pūmiyaik kaṉaleriparu
kavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkaimaṇṭalattāṅkiṉitiruntu vaṭaticaiyaṭippaṭuttu
tenṟicaittarummuntavamuntaḻaippa vetamu meymaiyum yukampolattalaittalai ciṟappavantaruḷi viya
ṟkarum poṟpuliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭaṉiṟai maṇimakuṭamuṟaimayiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellām niṉirattāy
pol tanṉaruḷ parantu taṉkoyiṟ koṟṟavācal puṟattu maṇiṉāvoṭuṅ muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻ mu
meṉ meloṅka ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceraḷarkaṭalpukaaḻitaruciṅkaṇarrañci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiraiyiṭa kanṉāṭar ventiṭa koṅkalarotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟettirai manṉaruntamaṟkaraṇeṉa tirumalaṟ cevaṭi Urimai
yiṟañcitollaiy Ēḻulakun toḻuteḻattonṟi mullaivāṇakai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaraṉi
mayattirun=taṉaṟeṉṉapporuntiyuṭaniruppa Āṅkavaṉmatiḻuṅkaṅkaiyoppāki terivayar tilatam tiyākapatā
kai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi puṉitakuṇavaṉitai tiripuvaṉamuḻutumuṭaiyāṉavaṉ tiruvuṉamuḻutumuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭan
virasimhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 6
vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu perumur nāṭṭu perumurāna Irājanārāyaṇaccatuppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūr nilam śrīvāṉavanmātevi vatikkum paḻuveṭṭaraiyaṉ vāykkālukku teṟkum
nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñcaturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam mukkāl veliyum Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil Āṟāñcaturattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Oru
veliyum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil Āṟāñcaturattu kiḻakkaṭaya nilam Oruveliyum rājārājappiṭāraveḷvatikku kiḻakkum paḻuveṭṭaraiya
n vāykkālukku teṟkumṉālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil mutal caturattu meṟkaṭaiya nilamoruveliyum Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil mutaṟ caturattu me
ṟkaṭaiya nilamoruveliyum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil mutaṟcaturattu nilamoruveliyum Āka nilam Añcemukkāl veliyum Itukku ku
ṭiiruppāka paḻuveṭṭairaiyaṉ vākkālukku teṟku Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟil Añcāñcaturattu Āṟṟukku kiḻakkāka tiruviṭarcē
rikuṭiiruppukku vaṭakkāka nilam kāl veliyum Āka nilam Āṟu veliyum coḻamaṇṭalattu paravaiccuṟṟu pūṇ
ṭiyuṭaiyāṉ cūriyaṉ pavaḻakkunṟaṉ vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyāṉukku Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu Ivaṉiṭai nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 8 10 4
Eṉpattunāluṅkoṇṭu Innilam paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilile Uccicantiyiṟku
mpiṭavan=ta Apūrviyāṇṭārkaḷ Añcukalam Uṇpatāka maṭappuṟamākavum paḻayaṉūril Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc ceykiṟa pavaḻakkuṉṟen(ṉ)
tirunan=tavaṉakkuṭikaḷukkuttirunan=tavaṉappuṟamākavum Iṟaiyiḻiccikācu Eṇpattu ṉālumaṟakkoṇṭu Āticaṇdheśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟu
kkuṭuttom rājanārāyaṇaccatuppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Iṉnilattukku van=taperiṟai ciṟṟiṟaiyum Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟa
riciyum cennirveṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷum nāṅkaḷe pokkaṟukkaṭavomākavum Ivai munnāka maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭanavūm collappeṟā
tomākavum Innilattukku nirkkin=tapaṭi pāccikkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum piṭavūrvati yivarkaḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku Uṭalanṟiye vaṭakku
nokki kalli kaṭampanerikku nirpāyap peṟuvatākavum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa kuṟṟam collap peṟātomākavum Ippaṭi can=tirāticcavarai ce
lvatāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom rājanārayaṇac caturvveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom paramātmanperāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai Iruṅkaṇṭi Attoṇabhaṭṭaṉ Agnijiyan vāyapeyāji Eḻuttu Ivaicen=tirattu Ajñabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇ(ṭ)ṭi Ārāamuta
paṭṭa Āyārāgnieḻuttu Itu Umiyūr tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaneḻuttu Uṟuppuṭṭūr cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Uṟuppuṭṭur Iḷaiyar muvār Eḻuttu Uṟuppuṭṭu
yajñamuttipaṭṭasomājiyār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kākkuṉāyaka bhaṭṭasya Āticaṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom rājanārāyaṇa catu
rvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ittaṉmam ceyvitteṉ tumpūraṉ tiruveṅkaṭam tirumāḷikaiappaṉeṉ panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
